title: 设置安全启动模板 (SecureBootTemplateId)
code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
# 常用安全启动模板 GUID
$tplWindows='1734c6e8-3154-4dda-ba5f-a874cc483422'  # MicrosoftWindows (Gen2 默认)
$tplMSUEFI ='272e7447-90a4-4563-a4b9-8e4ab00526ce'  # MicrosoftUEFICertificateAuthority (Linux/第三方)
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# 创建第二代虚拟机
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_secureboot_template'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
# 读取当前设置并写入模板
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled=$true
$vssd2.SecureBootTemplateId=$tplMSUEFI
$mr=$vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if($mr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $mr.Job|Out-Null}
# 读回(需从 VM 路径重新 GetRelated 取 VSSD)
$got=(([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1).SecureBootTemplateId
Write-Host "SecureBootTemplateId=$got"
# 清理
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)|Out-Null
output:
INITIAL SecureBootEnabled=True SecureBootTemplateId=1734C6E8-3154-4DDA-BA5F-A874CC483422
AFTER-SET-MSUEFI SecureBootTemplateId=272E7447-90A4-4563-A4B9-8E4AB00526CE SecureBootEnabled=True
AFTER-SET-WINDOWS SecureBootTemplateId=1734C6E8-3154-4DDA-BA5F-A874CC483422
PASS SecureBootTemplateId round-trip MSUEFI=272E7447-90A4-4563-A4B9-8E4AB00526CE Windows=1734C6E8-3154-4DDA-BA5F-A874CC483422
RESIDUAL-LEFT no
notes: 安全启动模板属性位于 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData，名为 SecureBootTemplateId（string，可读写），通过 ModifySystemSettings 下发，而非 ModifyResourceSettings。
两个常用模板 GUID：MicrosoftWindows=1734c6e8-3154-4dda-ba5f-a874cc483422（第二代虚拟机新建时的默认值）；MicrosoftUEFICertificateAuthority=272e7447-90a4-4563-a4b9-8e4ab00526ce（适用于 Linux 及第三方系统）。
读回的 GUID 为大写形式，比较时应先统一大小写（如 ToLower()）。新建第二代虚拟机时默认 SecureBootEnabled=True 且模板为 MicrosoftWindows。
修改后须从 $vm.__PATH 重新 GetRelated 获取 VSSD 才能读到新值，原有 $vssd2 句柄仍为修改前的快照。ModifySystemSettings 在本操作中同步返回 0。
notes_en: The secure boot template property resides in Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData and is named SecureBootTemplateId (string, read/write); it is applied via ModifySystemSettings rather than ModifyResourceSettings.

Two commonly used template GUIDs: MicrosoftWindows=1734c6e8-3154-4dda-ba5f-a874cc483422 (the default value when creating a Generation 2 virtual machine); MicrosoftUEFICertificateAuthority=272e7447-90a4-4563-a4b9-8e4ab00526ce (for Linux and third-party systems).

The GUID read back is in uppercase form, so normalize the case (e.g. ToLower()) before comparing. A newly created Generation 2 virtual machine defaults to SecureBootEnabled=True with the MicrosoftWindows template.

After modification, you must re-obtain the VSSD via GetRelated from $vm.__PATH to read the new value; the existing $vssd2 handle remains a snapshot from before the change. ModifySystemSettings returns 0 synchronously in this operation.
code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
# Commonly used secure boot template GUIDs
$tplWindows='1734c6e8-3154-4dda-ba5f-a874cc483422'  # MicrosoftWindows (Gen2 default)
$tplMSUEFI ='272e7447-90a4-4563-a4b9-8e4ab00526ce'  # MicrosoftUEFICertificateAuthority (Linux/third-party)
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# Create a Generation 2 virtual machine
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_secureboot_template'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
# Read the current settings and write the template
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled=$true
$vssd2.SecureBootTemplateId=$tplMSUEFI
$mr=$vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if($mr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $mr.Job|Out-Null}
# Read back (re-obtain the VSSD via GetRelated from the VM path)
$got=(([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1).SecureBootTemplateId
Write-Host "SecureBootTemplateId=$got"
# Cleanup
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)|Out-Null
